_comment: 2026-06-26: ratcheted from the CI-measured line coverage on run 28250327371 / e785648e (global 94.34%, 50787/53835). Floors sit below measured rates as no-regression baselines while keeping generated/experimental/studio domains visible. Branch coverage is gated separately by the perf-isolated branch-coverage CI lane via coverage_guard_branch_thresholds.json (performance tests deselected there; enabling branch=true in the main coverage matrix flips tight wall-clock perf tests under coverage).
_comment_stl: 2026-07-16: monitor/stl holds an explicit 100% file floor — the package previously escaped the honesty registry behind a dead coverage omit; measured 446/446 lines covered (KIMI lane K-STL0).
_comment_openqasm: 2026-07-21: openqasm_conformance.py + neuromorphic_ir_export.py ship at 100% line+branch coverage (new modules, KIMI lane D3 H1-H4); pinned as no-regression floors.
_comment_c37118: 2026-07-21: synchrophasor_c37118.py ships at 100% line+branch coverage (new module, KIMI lane D1 M1 — IEEE C37.118.2 frame codec); pinned as a no-regression floor.
